app.name: AION Console
app.tagline: Control your AI in real time

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Configure how your AI behaves — no code required.
onboarding.step1_desc: See if your AI is running and how much it's saving.
onboarding.step2_desc: Set whether your AI should be more direct, economic, or detailed.
onboarding.step3_desc: Decide which AI to use for each type of question.
onboarding.step4_desc: Configure what your AI can and cannot do.
onboarding.step5_desc: See in real time what AION is deciding and why.

global.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
global.error_connection: Could not connect to AION. Check if the service is running.
global.error_timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
global.error_permission: You don't have permission for this action.
global.confirm_apply_desc: This configuration will be applied to AION immediately.
global.confirm_reset_desc: All custom settings will be lost.
global.toast_error: Failed to save. Please try again.

status.title: Overview
status.subtitle: Is everything under control?
status.badge_offline_desc: AION is not responding. Check the service.
status.metric_latency_tooltip: Average AION response time, including processing and AI model calls.
status.metric_bypass_rate_tooltip: Percentage of questions answered without calling the AI — like greetings and simple commands.
status.metric_ai_calls_tooltip: Total number of times AION needed to call an AI model.
status.metric_savings_tooltip: Money saved by bypassing simple questions and optimizing calls.
status.metric_top_model_tooltip: The AI model AION chose most frequently.
status.metric_total_requests_tooltip: Total number of questions processed by AION.
status.metric_error_rate_tooltip: Percentage of requests that resulted in errors.
status.fallback_desc: Cases where the primary model failed and AION used an alternative.
status.fallback_empty: No recent fallbacks. Everything running smoothly.
status.empty_desc: AION is ready, but hasn't received any requests yet. Send a message to get started.
status.empty_cta: How to send your first request

policies.title: AI Behavior
policies.subtitle: How do you want your AI to behave?
policies.dial_objectivity_desc: How direct the AI should be in responses.
policies.dial_objectivity_tooltip: Controls the level of context in responses. More objective = shorter, more direct answers.
policies.dial_verbosity_desc: How much detail the AI includes in responses.
policies.dial_verbosity_tooltip: Sets response length. Less verbose = fewer tokens = lower cost.
policies.dial_economy_desc: Prioritize lower cost or higher quality.
policies.dial_economy_tooltip: When active, AION prioritizes cheaper models and shorter responses.
policies.dial_explanation_desc: How much the AI explains the reasoning behind responses.
policies.dial_explanation_tooltip: Great for new teams: more explanation. For experts: just the answer.
policies.dial_confidence_desc: Minimum certainty level for the AI to respond.
policies.dial_confidence_tooltip: When confidence is low, AION may ask for more information or refuse to answer.
policies.dial_safe_mode_desc: How conservative the AI should be.
policies.dial_safe_mode_tooltip: In conservative mode, the AI avoids ambiguous responses and blocks more sensitive content.
policies.dial_formality_tooltip: Adjusts the tone of responses — from casual and approachable to corporate and formal.
policies.preset_direct_desc: Short answers, cheap models. Ideal for operations.
policies.preset_explain_desc: Detailed responses with context. Ideal for new teams.
policies.preset_balanced_desc: Middle ground between cost and quality. Recommended default.
policies.apply_confirm_desc: The AI will start behaving according to these settings immediately.
policies.toast_error: Could not save. Please try again.
policies.empty_desc: The AI is running with the balanced preset. Customize behavior to match your needs.
policies.approval_needed: This change needs approval before going to production.

routing.title: Routing
routing.subtitle: Which brain for each problem?
routing.priority_tooltip: Sets the main criteria for choosing a model. Cost = cheapest first. Quality = most capable first.
routing.rules_desc: Define which model to use for each type of question.
routing.fallback_desc: If the primary model fails, AION tries the next one in the list.
routing.fallback_empty: No fallbacks configured. If the primary model fails, the request will return an error.
routing.fallback_warning: No fallback configured. We recommend at least one alternative model.
routing.latency_desc: Maximum response time before triggering the fallback.
routing.latency_tooltip: If the model doesn't respond within this time, AION automatically tries the next model in the chain.
routing.empty_desc: AION is routing everything to the default model. Configure rules to optimize cost and quality.
routing.tooltip_latency: Average response time for this model.

estixe.title: Protection
estixe.subtitle: What can your AI NOT do?
estixe.bypass_desc: Answers simple questions without calling the AI, saving cost and time.
estixe.bypass_tooltip: When enabled, greetings, farewells, and confirmations are answered automatically without calling the AI model.
estixe.intents_desc: Types of messages AION answers automatically.
estixe.intent_farewell_desc: Bye, see you, thanks for everything, etc.
estixe.intent_gratitude_desc: Thanks, thank you, much appreciated, etc.
estixe.intent_confirmation_desc: OK, got it, yes, right, etc.
estixe.blocks_desc: Categories the AI should refuse to answer.
estixe.security_prompt_injection_desc: Detects and blocks attempts to manipulate the AI.
estixe.security_system_leak_desc: Prevents users from extracting the system prompt.
estixe.threshold_bypass_confidence_tooltip: Minimum certainty level for AION to bypass a message without calling the AI.
estixe.threshold_block_confidence_tooltip: Minimum certainty level for AION to block a message.
estixe.empty_desc: AION is using basic protections. Customize for your use case.
estixe.warning_disable_bypass: Disabling bypass will send all messages to the AI, increasing cost.
estixe.warning_lower_threshold: Lowering this threshold may allow more incorrect bypasses.
estixe.warning_disable_security: Disabling this protection may expose the system to risks.

operations.title: Operations
operations.subtitle: Why did AION make that decision?
operations.empty_desc: When AION processes requests, decisions will appear here in real time.
operations.error_connection_desc: Could not connect to AION. Operations are not being updated.
operations.auto_refresh_tooltip: When enabled, the table refreshes automatically every 5 seconds.
